name: zvid_pack_color_rgb
description: zVid_PackColorRGB masks and shifts 8-bit RGB components into the active framebuffer pixel format using the global pixel-pack parameters.
known_limits: Covered as part of the zVideo pixel-pack smoke alongside float packing and clear-color state.

VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for @zVid_PackColorRGB@12 at 0x4a6cf0 still fails: 69 unmasked mismatches, 20 relocation bytes masked, 6 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed, Binary Ninja body is 71 bytes and the VC object symbol is 96 bytes.
binary_safe_evidence: Binary Ninja shows red/green masks and shifts from globals plus blue right-shift by the global BShiftTo8 value, returning the ORed packed value.
The native zVideo pack-color smoke validates 5:6:5 packing from configured masks and shifts.
